summary: Comprehensive testing of ProblemWorkspace feature - unified DSA problem solving page with code editor, test cases, and AI chatbot. All 18 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Test user and session already existed in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: ProblemWorkspace feature fully tested. Key test areas: /problems page with 15068 problems, /problems/:problemId workspace with 3-panel layout (description, code editor, AI chatbot), 22 language support, test cases tab, code evaluation, problem-specific AI chat. All APIs use real Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM Key (no mocking).

problems_list.details: 15068 problems loaded, filters (topic, pattern, difficulty, company), search, pagination all working

problem_navigation.details: Clicking problem row navigates to /problems/:problemId correctly

problem_workspace_layout.details: 3-panel layout: Description (left), Code Editor (right top), AI Chatbot (right bottom)

language_selector.details: 22 languages available: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C++, C, C#, Go, Rust, Ruby, PHP, Swift, Kotlin, Scala, R, Perl, Lua, Haskell, Dart, Elixir, Julia, MATLAB

language_template_change.details: Changing language updates editor template correctly

test_cases_tab.details: Shows AI-generated test cases with input, expected output, and explanation

code_evaluate_api.details: POST /api/code/evaluate returns evaluation result with score, feedback, test results

navbar_updated.details: Navbar no longer shows separate IDE or Chatbot links

dashboard_quick_actions.details: 'Solve Problems' quick action links to /problems with description 'DSA with built-in IDE & AI help'
